name: Tom Yam Goong (Hot and Sour Soup)
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Shrimp or prawns, shelled and deveined.
5 Kaffir lime leaves OR strips of lemon peel
3 Thin slices fresh ginger OR 1/4 cup dried galangal OR 1/4 cup fresh ginger
2 Stalks lemon grass (use only the lower third), cut into 1-inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the reserved shells and place them in a pot of water.
2. Bring the water to a boil, then strain out the shells.
3. Add garlic, lime leaves or lemon strips, ginger or galangal or fresh ginger, fish sauce, lemon grass (only the lower third), shallots, straw mushrooms, and chilis to the pot.
4. Simmer for 2 minutes.
5. Add the shrimp and bring back to a boil. Cook until the shrimp turn pink, about 3-4 minutes.
6. In a serving bowl, mix lime juice and chili paste.
7. Pour the soup into the bowl, stir in the lime mixture, and garnish with cilantro leaves.
8. Serve hot to 4 people.
